channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 3 or 4 long potholes in middle of the road, 25th June
item.description:
Potholes have been here for a few months and are a danger In fact 2 of them have been painted through it’s been that long and the council see fit to remark the road rather than repair it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Halfway Street, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins remained uncollected, 25th June
item.description:
Disgusting litter strewn pathway closed of due to rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Square, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Radiator dumped on path, 25th June
item.description:
Radiator left on communal path by bike locker.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buchan Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Fly-tipping, 25th June
item.description:
Fly-tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Finsbury Park Avenue, Harringay, Greater London

item.title: Tree diseased, 25th June
item.description:
Most of the tree is diseased and dead, can it be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 154, Harland Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th June
item.description:
Regular fly tipping spot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawes Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe Roadworks Barriers Left in Roadway, 25th June
item.description:
I would like to report a potential safety hazard at the junction near Edmund Road and NorthfieldAvenue. Several temporary roadwork barriers and traffic cones appear to have fallen over and been left in the carriageway and adjacent footpath. These barriers could obstruct vehicles, cyclists, pedestrians, or wheelchair users and may present a risk, particularly in poor visibility. Please arrange for the site to be inspected and the barriers secured or removed as soon as possible. I have attached a photograph showing the location and condition of the barriers. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edmund Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Large potholes on junction, 25th June
item.description:
There is one large pothole and several small ones on the junction into Dunton Road. This is a busy junction for cars, cyclists and pedestrians and should be fixed asap to avoid accidents. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving extremely dangerous outside Perfect Teeth N11 1AT, 25th June
item.description:
The paving stones are completely dangerous, they move up and down and today I nearly fell over because of this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bowes Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish & fly tipping, 25th June
item.description:
Large amount of fly-tipped waste dumped beside the bins, including bags of rubbish, clothing, bedding, cardboard, shoes, and miscellaneous household items. Waste is blocking the area around the bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th June
item.description:
Dead fox on side of road on Brenchley Gardens near turn off to Kelvington Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-15, Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo bags in full bin, 25th June
item.description:
Bins in children’s playground are full and stink cos dog pooh bags in them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapter Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown foliage blocking view of road, 25th June
item.description:
At the junction of Etchingham park rd and squires lane there’s an overgrown tree on the corner obstructing the view when you’re trying to turn on to squires lane - it’s dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Squires Lane, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane pole has been knocked down, 25th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108-110, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London

Outside 62 Lea Bridge road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lea Bridge Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Rubbish Flytipped on corner of Raleigh and Cecil Rd, Enfield Town, 25th June
item.description:
This pile of wood and general household rubbish is blocking the pavement and is very unsightly and dangerous to passers by. It was dumped sometime today

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Raleigh Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on pavement, 25th June
item.description:
Bike parked on pavement restricting access and endangering people

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Elsworthy Road, Belsize Park, Greater London

item.title: Bin, 25th June
item.description:
Litter all over street. You need a hot weather litter strategy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29-33, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: 10 or so abandoned cycles blocking the path, 25th June
item.description:
Around 10 or so abandoned cycles blocking the path and need to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th June
item.description:
Yet more flytipping at this location. Appeared today. Previously reported fly tipped clothes airer remains.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coleraine Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
